description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat, multi-tiered roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a combination of dark and light surfaces, with prominent use of concrete or stucco and large glass windows. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped planters, with greenery visible on two sides. The front facade includes a recessed entryway, a covered porch, and a driveway or walkway leading up to the entrance. Minimalist landscaping and a small tree add to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat, layered roof, large windows, and minimalist landscaping. The exterior combines dark and light materials with clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, driveway, and landscaped planters with a small tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered roof structure, boundary wall, and a glimpse of the rear garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional greenery, and the full extent of the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch overhang, side windows, and more landscaping detail.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a covered porch, minimal steps, and a simple, modern door
